calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Counsel John Cowan, Esq., Specially Appearance for Plaintiff/Respondent American Air Testing,Inc.; John R. Riera/director and Laura Riera/CEO of American Air Testing, Inc. are also present.
Counsel Mark T.Freeman, Esq., (925) 937-3900, appearing for Defendant/Appellant James E. Faircloth and Jessica Alexus who are also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Counsel Cowan testifies on behalf of American Air Testing, Inc.; John R. Riera also testifies on behalf of American Air Testing, Inc. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibits (A) - package of Status Report
Exhibits (B) - copy of contract
Exhibits (C) - 8/1/13 invoice
Counsel requests legal fee which is in the company's contract.

Appellant/ Defendant, Alexus testifies on her own behalf. Counsel Freeman redirect Alexus on her testimony. The Following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibit not marked - copy of contract.
Exhibit (1) 8/1/2013 invoice
Exhibit (2) copy of correspondence (e-mail- dated 8/8/2013)

Mr. Faircloth testifies on his own behalf and Counsel Freeman testifies on behalf of Mr. Faircloth.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Appellant and respondent's exhibits are retained by the Court; plaintiff's exhibits from Small Claims Dept. remains with the Court file.

Judge Pro tem David H. Fleisig, Clerk Jean Kong, Not Reported (D525)
